body.title: UnseenUniversity Phase 0 — lock design decisions and create repo
body.text:
# D-adc-phase-0-2026-04-27
**title:** UnseenUniversity Phase 0 — lock design decisions and create repo
**date:** 2026-04-27
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-adc-repo-bootstrap, T-adc-claudeandakien-salvage, T-adc-imap-impl-decision, T-adc-claude-mailbox-naming-lock, T-adc-queue-overflow-default-lock, T-adc-installer-bootstrap-call

## Decision narrative

Locked all design decisions for UnseenUniversity before Phase 1 code is written. Key calls: separate github repo (akienm/UnseenUniversity) not inside TheIgors; IMAP bus backed by Dovecot for production / Python stub for tests; CC.0 as global Claude mailbox + CC.N per-session; drop-oldest as rack default queue overflow policy; installer bootstrap paradox deferred to Phase 4 with v0 bridge = existing igor launcher.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-04-27T21:38:50.089141+00:00
**Ticket count:** 6 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-adc-repo-bootstrap (M) — UnseenUniversity: create github repo and scaffold full directory structure  `done` — Repo created at https://github.com/akienm/unseen_university. Full scaffold committed and pushed: 39 files, all spec dirs, pyproject.toml, CLAUDE.md, README stub, .gitignore. pip install -e . passes. Al
- T-adc-installer-bootstrap-call (S) — UnseenUniversity: document installer bootstrap decision (deferred to Phase 4)  `done` — docs/decisions/installer-bootstrap.md written and pushed. Paradox stated clearly. v0 bridge = igor launcher (not a device). Phase 4 target = agentctl init, pip install, ubuntu+macOS, no igor dep, Post
- T-adc-queue-overflow-default-lock (S) — UnseenUniversity: lock queue overflow default and create DeviceConfig dataclass  `done` — DeviceConfig dataclass in config/device_config.py. drop-oldest default, drop_newest override, restart loop protection fields. to_dict() serializes cleanly. Tests pass.
- T-adc-claude-mailbox-naming-lock (S) — UnseenUniversity: lock Claude mailbox naming convention (CC.0 + CC.N per-session)  `done` — constants.py in devices/claude/: GLOBAL_MAILBOX='CC.0', get_session_mailbox() reads CLAUDE_SESSION_ID env. docs/decisions/mailbox-naming.md written. All tests pass.
- T-adc-claudeandakien-salvage (S) — UnseenUniversity: migrate workflow docs from ClaudeAndAkien, archive old repo  `done` — 4 docs migrated: framework_overview (updated for ADC), getting_started (updated for agentctl init), working_together (kept), crash_safe_sessions (kept). ClaudeAndAkien README has archived notice point
- T-adc-imap-impl-decision (S) — UnseenUniversity: spike Dovecot vs embedded Python IMAP, document decision  `done` — Spike complete: Python asyncio stub works at ~80 lines (APPEND+IDLE verified). Decision: Dovecot for production, Python stub for tests. docs/decisions/imap-impl.md written. Spike at lab/spikes/imap_st

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
